Name: Island Winery
Address: 15 Cardinal Road, Hilton Head Island, SC 29926
Notes: Family-owned Hilton Head winery with approachable tastings, custom labels, and a broad mix of fruit wines plus classic reds and whites.

Name: Bee Town Mead & Cider
Notes: South Carolina’s first production meadery with a Lowcountry mead hall, award-winning meads, and cider offerings.

Name: Deep Water Vineyard
Address: 6775 Bears Bluff Road, Wadmalaw Island, SC 29487
Notes: Charleston-area vineyard and winery producing muscadine wines on site, with tastings, vineyard walks, and a broad agritourism destination setting.

Name: Silver Dew Winery
Address: 18 Simmons Road - Broad Creek Marina, Hilton Head Island, SC 29926
